name: lyra-site-designer
description: Static site design and implementation for developer tools, open-source projects, and technical documentation sites - information architecture, modern CSS (container queries, :has(), OKLCH, light-dark(), View Transitions), design tokens, docs-first frameworks (Starlight, VitePress, Docusaurus 3), developer UX patterns - 1 skill, 1 agent, 1 command, 6 reference sheets
